triggers.reply: Thanks for letting me know. Can you try refreshing the exam page on your end?
I see that too. Please give it a few seconds — if it's still frozen, try reloading the browser tab.
No worries, that happens. Please reconnect when you're ready and we'll resume the session.
Hello! I'm your proctor for today's session. How can I help you?
You're welcome. Let me know if you need anything else.
Please hold your valid ID up to the camera so I can verify it.
That's fine, just let me know before you step away and I'll pause the timer.
Let's do a quick audio check — can you say something so I can confirm I hear you?
I can see your camera feed is active. Can you adjust it so your full face and workspace are visible?
I noticed some movement in the background. Could you confirm you're alone in the testing area?
Yes, you're clear to begin whenever you're ready. Good luck!
Great, I can see the submission on my end. Thank you for completing the exam.

fallbackReplies: Got it, one moment while I check that on my end.
